Class LaptopDaoImpl

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.dao.LaptopDaoImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
LaptopDao
public class LaptopDaoImpl extends Object implements LaptopDao
Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for managing Laptop entities.

This class provides concrete database operations for the Laptop entity, including creating, reading, updating, deleting, and searching laptop records in the database. It acts as a bridge between the application and the underlying database layer.

All database interactions are performed using JDBC, and connections are managed through the DatabaseConnection utility class.

This implementation follows the LaptopDao interface, ensuring a consistent contract for all laptop-related persistence operations.

Author:
Sugam Rana Magar

    • LaptopDaoImpl

      public LaptopDaoImpl()

  • Method Details

    • deleteByLaptopID

      public boolean deleteByLaptopID(int laptopID)
      Specified by:
      deleteByLaptopID in interface LaptopDao
      Parameters:
      laptopID - the unique identifier of the laptop to be deleted
      Returns:
      true if the deletion operation is successful, false if an error occurs during the process
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged

    • insertLaptop

      public boolean insertLaptop(Laptop laptop)
      Specified by:
      insertLaptop in interface LaptopDao
      Parameters:
      laptop - the Laptop object containing all required details to be inserted into the database
      Returns:
      true if the insertion is successful, false if an error occurs during execution
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged

    • getLaptopById

      public Laptop getLaptopById(int id)
      Specified by:
      getLaptopById in interface LaptopDao
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the laptop to retrieve
      Returns:
      the corresponding Laptop object if found; null if no matching record exists or an error occurs
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged

    • getLaptopByUUID

      public Laptop getLaptopByUUID(String laptopUUID)
      Specified by:
      getLaptopByUUID in interface LaptopDao
      Parameters:
      laptopUUID - the unique UUID of the laptop to retrieve
      Returns:
      the corresponding Laptop object if found; null if no matching record exists or an error occurs
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged

    • updateLaptop

      public boolean updateLaptop(Laptop laptop)
      Specified by:
      updateLaptop in interface LaptopDao
      Parameters:
      laptop - the Laptop object containing updated values, including the ID of the laptop to be modified
      Returns:
      true if the update operation is successful, false if an error occurs during execution
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged

    • fetchAllLaptops

      public ArrayList<Laptop> fetchAllLaptops(int start, int limit)
      Specified by:
      fetchAllLaptops in interface LaptopDao
      Returns:
      an ArrayList containing all Laptop objects; null if an error occurs during execution
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged

    • totalLaptops

      public int totalLaptops()
      Specified by:
      totalLaptops in interface LaptopDao

    • getLaptopsFilterSearch

      public ArrayList<Laptop> getLaptopsFilterSearch(String searchWord, String brand, String category, String priceCondition, int start, int limit)
      Specified by:
      getLaptopsFilterSearch in interface LaptopDao
      Parameters:
      searchWord - the keyword used to search across multiple laptop fields
      brand - the brand filter (case-insensitive, partial match)
      category - the category filter (case-insensitive, partial match)
      priceCondition - the selected price range condition
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of matching Laptop objects; null if an error occurs during execution
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged

    • countLaptopsFilterSearch

      public int countLaptopsFilterSearch(String searchWord, String brand, String category, String priceCondition)
      Counts the number of laptops that match the given search and filter criteria.

      This method applies filters for brand, category, keyword search, and price range. The price range is determined by the priceCondition parameter.

      Specified by:
      countLaptopsFilterSearch in interface LaptopDao
      Parameters:
      searchWord - keyword used for searching across multiple fields
      brand - brand filter (case-insensitive, partial match)
      category - category filter (case-insensitive, partial match)
      priceCondition - price range selector (1–5)
      Returns:
      the total number of matching laptops, or 0 if an error occurs

    • getCountByCategory

      public HashMap<String,Integer> getCountByCategory()
      Retrieves the number of laptops grouped by predefined categories.

      This method executes a COUNT query for each category and stores the results in a HashMap, where the key is the category name and the value is the total number of laptops in that category.

      Specified by:
      getCountByCategory in interface LaptopDao
      Returns:
      a HashMap containing category names as keys and their corresponding laptop counts as values, or null if an error occurs

    • lowStockNoStockCount

      public int lowStockNoStockCount()
      Counts the number of laptops that are either low stock or out of stock.
      Specified by:
      lowStockNoStockCount in interface LaptopDao
      Returns:
      the total number of laptops with availability status LOW STOCK or OUT OF STOCK, or 0 if an error occurs

    • getTotalValuation

      public double getTotalValuation()
      Calculates the total inventory valuation of all laptops.

      This method computes the sum of stockQuantity * price for all laptop records in the database.

      Specified by:
      getTotalValuation in interface LaptopDao
      Returns:
      the total valuation of all laptops in stock, or 0 if an error occurs

    • laptopAssginer

      public Laptop laptopAssginer(ResultSet rs)
      Laptop assginer laptop.
      Parameters:
      rs - the ResultSet positioned at a valid row containing laptop data
      Returns:
      a fully populated Laptop object, or null if a SQLException occurs during mapping
      Throws:
      Exception - no exception is thrown directly, but any SQLException encountered is caught and logged
